mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, receiver_user_id, notification_id, process_instance_id, notification_type, title, read_status, gmt_create
mapper.insert: insert into se_user_notification_index(tenant_id, receiver_user_id, notification_id, process_instance_id, notification_type, title, read_status, gmt_create) values (#{tenantId}, #{receiverUserId}, #{notificationId}, #{processInstanceId}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{readStatus}, #{gmtCreate})
mapper.delete: delete from se_user_notification_index where notification_id = #{notificationId} and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
